name: browser-workflow
description: Machine-readable browser extraction workflow definition — browser session lifecycle, navigation, DOM capture, dynamic rendering, and content validation.

url.description: Target URL to navigate to and capture

engine.description: Browser engine to use (chrome-devtools-mcp, jcodesmore-browser, firecrawl)

steps.name: Create Browser Session
steps.description: Initialize a new browser session for the specified engine

steps.name: Navigate to URL
steps.description: Navigate the browser session to the target URL with timeout

steps.name: Capture DOM Content
steps.description: Extract the full DOM/HTML content from the current page

steps.name: Apply Dynamic Rendering
steps.description: Expand hidden content, lazy-loaded elements, accordions, and tabs

steps.name: Expand Lazy Loading
steps.description: Convert data-src to src, expand noscript tags, remove lazy-load constraints

steps.name: Expand Hidden Content
steps.description: Remove display:none, height:0, visibility:hidden, aria-hidden constraints

steps.name: Discover Page Assets
steps.description: Identify and catalog page assets (images, videos, downloads, JSON-LD)

steps.name: Validate Browser Output
steps.description: Validate that captured HTML meets minimum quality thresholds

steps.name: Report Browser Metrics
steps.description: Record navigation time, capture time, asset count, and session metrics

steps.name: Close Browser Session
steps.description: Clean up browser session resources and close session
